name: Classic Oat Pathway Runner
keyBenefits: Slip-resistant top texture for stable paw placement
Waterproof barrier prevents moisture from reaching floors
Thick comfort core eases pressure on stiff joints
care: Vacuum weekly. Spot clean with mild soap. Machine wash cold on gentle cycle and air dry.
description: A neutral premium runner that quietly blends into modern homes while giving senior dogs a safer path.

name: Modern Grid Stone Runner
keyBenefits: Fully waterproof shield for accidents and spills
Dense orthopedic cushion to support arthritic movement
Grip-tech base keeps the runner anchored
care: Shake out debris. Wipe with damp cloth. Wash on cold with non-bleach detergent and hang dry.
description: A geometric design that elevates your interior while creating a dependable runway for older dogs.

name: Playful Hearth Fern Runner
keyBenefits: Micro-texture face helps paws grip while standing
Accident-ready waterproof layer for easy cleanup
Comfort foam helps reduce impact during daily walks
care: Spot clean as needed. Machine wash on delicate. Lay flat to dry before use.
description: Warm, charming styling for family spaces with the same senior-dog safety performance underneath.
